---
title: "Interactive Business Analytics Using R and Shiny"
format: html
---

## You can click the link, type it into your browser, or scan the QR code below.

🔗 **Website:** <https://gennyn.github.io/>

## Project Materials                                               

[Handout](https://gennyn.github.io/handout.html)

[Presentation](https://gennyn.github.io/presentation.html)

::: text-center
![](qr_code.png){width="250px"}
:::
